args.description: Supported curl-style argv list excluding the leading executable. Parsed by the Lua runtime as a supported subset, not full curl CLI compatibility. Shell expansion, stdin/TTY interaction, interactive prompts, curl config files, and unsupported dash-prefixed curl options are not available. Example: ["-X", "POST", "https://example.com", "-H", "Authorization: Bearer ..."]

cwd.description: Optional working directory used to resolve relative file paths for -o, -F @file, <file, --cacert, --capath, --cert, --key, --proxy-cacert, --proxy-capath, --proxy-cert, --proxy-key and related inputs.

timeout_ms.description: Optional default timeout in milliseconds when curl args do not provide --max-time. Defaults to 60000.

flags.description: Optional comma-separated render flags string outside args. Example: "request-header,response-header". Empty by default. Use request-header to include request details, response-header to include response headers. Unknown flags are ignored.
